title: elodes formosa
intro: Elodes formosa, also known as Chinese box or Elsholtzia, is a flowering plant species native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Elodes formosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being.
